'''âh-f-l-w''' ('''kahaflewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isochronise|isochronise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-f-l-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isochronise|isochronise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-f-l-w
|-
! Lemma
| kahaflewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihaflewoko|thihaflewoko]] || [[word:jihaflewoko|jihaflewoko]] || [[word:shihaflewoko|shihaflewoko]] || [[word:kihaflewoko|kihaflewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhaflewoko|thuthuhaflewoko]] || [[word:jujuhaflewoko|jujuhaflewoko]] || [[word:shushuhaflewoko|shushuhaflewoko]] || [[word:kukuhaflewoko|kukuhaflewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohaflewoko|thothohaflewoko]] || [[word:jojohaflewoko|jojohaflewoko]] || [[word:shoshohaflewoko|shoshohaflewoko]] || [[word:kokohaflewoko|kokohaflewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohaflewoko|thohaflewoko]] || [[word:johaflewoko|johaflewoko]] || [[word:shohaflewoko|shohaflewoko]] || [[word:kohaflewoko|kohaflewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohaflewoko|thohaflewoko]] || [[word:johaflewoko|johaflewoko]] || [[word:shohaflewoko|shohaflewoko]] || [[word:kohaflewoko|kohaflewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠhaflewoko|thĂŠhaflewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠhaflewoko|jĂŠhaflewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠhaflewoko|shĂŠhaflewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠhaflewoko|kĂŠhaflewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahaflewoko|thahaflewoko]] || [[word:jahaflewoko|jahaflewoko]] || [[word:shahaflewoko|shahaflewoko]] || [[word:kahaflewoko|kahaflewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
